title: Glorious Bitter Vietnamese Tofu Noodles
description: A plant-based Vietnamese dish featuring marinated tofu and bitter flavors, topped with glace cherry for a pop of color and sweetness.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: bitter melon
ingredients.notes: sliced and soaked in salt water

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and grated ginger to make the marinade.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and let it sit for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the marinated tofu until golden brown.
Add the sliced bitter melon to the skillet and cook until tender.
Combine the cooked noodles, tofu, and bitter melon in a large bowl.
Top with sliced glace cherry and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
